'''Simpla-12''' was a neglected, underdeveloped planet, strip-mined and criminal-infested. [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] had a lab on the planet surface, and performed her twisted experiments on unfortunate [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] there. The thieves [[Cholly]], [[Weez]], and [[Tup (thief)|Tup]] lived there, as well as the bounty hunter [[Ona Nobis]].

{{Planet-stub}}
